summary: Complete testing of NEW features: DTS backend (real API), Transition Verification Team portal, DTS Management Team portal, Voice verification endpoint, Orbiting balls animation, and end-to-end flows across all 3 roles (benefactor, beneficiary, admin).
passed_tests: POST /api/dts/tasks - create DTS task (benefactor only) ✓
GET /api/dts/tasks/{estate_id} - list DTS tasks for estate ✓
GET /api/dts/tasks/all - admin gets ALL DTS tasks ✓ (endpoint was missing, added it)
POST /api/dts/tasks/{id}/quote - admin submits quote with line items ✓
POST /api/dts/tasks/{id}/status - admin updates status ✓
GET /api/transition/certificates/all - enriched certificates with estate_name, uploader_name ✓
POST /api/transition/reject/{id} - reject certificate (admin only) ✓
POST /api/voice/transcribe - Whisper transcription endpoint exists (returns 400 without file, not 404) ✓
Admin portal has 3 tabs: All Users, Transition Verification, DTS Management ✓
DTS Management tab shows real tasks from backend (4 tasks found including test tasks) ✓
DTS Management tab shows task details with Update Status buttons ✓
Transition Verification tab shows 'No Certificates to Review' when none pending ✓
Beneficiary hub shows orbiting balls visualization (data-testid='orbit-visualization') ✓
Orbiting balls show central user PM with estate 'MF' orbiting around ✓
Benefactor DTS page creates real tasks via API ✓
Benefactor DTS page shows real task stats: 4 Total Tasks, 2 Awaiting Review, 1 Ready, $550 Total ✓
Benefactor DTS page 'New Request' button opens 5-step wizard ✓
Beneficiary login flow works with OTP ✓
Beneficiary hub shows connected estates ✓
Beneficiary can navigate to pre-transition page ✓
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST DTS tasks via backend tests for testing quote submission and status updates
context_for_next_testing_agent: DTS backend is now REAL (not mocked). All DTS endpoints work: create task, get tasks, submit quote, update status. Admin portal has 3 tabs working with real data. Orbit visualization uses requestAnimationFrame for physics-driven animation. Voice transcribe endpoint exists but requires real audio file upload (uses OpenAI Whisper via emergentintegrations). Previous iteration_10 features still working.
fix_applied: Added missing GET /api/dts/tasks/all endpoint for admin to fetch all DTS tasks across all estates. Frontend AdminPage.js was calling this endpoint but it didn't exist.
